data.text:
# Make Me A Small Customer Support Dashboa

Generated by Binary IDE as a portable `package_bundle` starter bundle.

## Intent

Make me a small customer support dashboard with a login screen, ticket list, and search.

## Run

```bash
npm install
npm run build
npm start
```

## Runtime

- Runtime: node18
- Platform: portable
- Package manager: npm
- Target source path: src/index.ts
- Grounded workspace context: Active file: trading/ai-trading-research/Math-Foundations One/strategies/pending/CMMI_Strategy_6.pine. Preferred target: trading/ai-trading-research/Math-Foundations One/strategies/pending/CMMI_Strategy_6.pine. Mentioned paths: trading/ai-trading-research/Math-Foundations One/strategies/pending/CMMI_Strategy_6.pine. Open files: trading/ai-trading-research/Math-Foundations One/strategies/pending/CMMI_Strategy_6.pine.
